title: SimpleMagnets
description: A simple magnet mod for Fabric 1.17
body:
A simple magnet mod. This mod adds two magnets, a normal magnet and a strong magnet. You can put curse of vanishing and unbreaking on the magnets ( using the anvil ).

Normal magnet

Pickup speed: 5 tick
Range: 16 blocks
This magnet has 1024 uses.
Crafting:

Strong magnet

Pickup speed: 1 tick
Range: 32 blocks
This magnet has 1500 uses.
Crafting:
